creative_intent: This should feel like sitting at a vintage numbers station radio, catching fleeting firefly-like signal pulses and using precise timing to decode their digits before they fade away.
meaningful_decisions: Timing: press SPACE at the right moment within the catch window to capture each firefly digit
Frequency: shift between LF/MF/HF bands (arrow keys) to match each firefly's frequency
Lock-on: hold SPACE for 0.5s to guarantee a catch at the cost of 1 second of vulnerability
escalation: 6 progressive phases (Calm→Rising→Intense→Chaos→Firestorm→Climax) with faster spawns, multiple simultaneous fireflies, and decoy signals
payoff: Full signal decoded with celebratory firefly field; failed runs show 'SIGNAL LOST' debrief
restart: Single SPACE press from outcome screen resets all state for clean new run
